golden.answer_preview:
An exit load is the amount payable when a person chooses to withdraw from a mutual fund. This charge is usually applied to the total investment.

For HDFC Banking & Financial Services Fund Direct Growth:
* The exit load is 1% if redeemed within 30 days.

The HDFC NIFTY Midcap 150 Index Fund Direct Growth tracks the NIFTY Midcap 150 Total Return Index.

This information is stated on the Groww page for the HDFC NIFTY Midcap 150 Index Fund Direct Growth.

The expense ratio for HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth is 0.83%.

This information is officially listed under the "Fund Overview" section on the Groww mutual fund page for HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth.

An exit load might apply when redeeming units of HDFC Value Fund Direct Plan Growth under specific conditions, which aligns with the general purpose of exit loads on Groww.
